title: Gameless
description: this texturepack add some new things like custom items then you rename it and some inventory changes and connected textures
body:
# GERMAN:
dies ist ein Texturen paket was eine haus eigene Elytra enthält, custom tools und so weiter wenn man Optifine oder CIT Resewn und Continuity nutzt kann man connected textures von blöcken und custom items sehen wenn man die namen ändert.

# ENGLISH:
this is a texture pack which contains an in-house Elytra, custom tools and so on if you use
Optifine
or
CIT Resewn
and 
Continuity
 you can see connected textures of blocks and custom items if you change the names.


## **Credits:**
- [Connected Trials](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/connected-trials)
- [Domenik_YT(1) [Owner from Gameless]](https://modrinth.com/user/Domenik_YT1)

## **INFO:**
- Starting with Version V2, the texture pack can be found here: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gameless-v2),
And before V2, you can find it here: [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/gameless)


## **NOTE:**
pls respect people and don't be Racist!
